# Cholan Arts

> Authentic Chola style bronze idols and heritage art, preserving ancient traditions.

Cholan Arts specializes in crafting authentic, museum-quality bronze idols and heritage art using the traditional 1,000-year-old Lost-Wax method. The website serves individuals seeking to enrich their pooja spaces, homes, or collections with pieces that embody Indian history, culture, and devotion. Each sculpture is imbued with a sense of soul and carries the essence of ancient Indian artistry.

The core value proposition lies in the preservation of a dying art form and the delivery of unparalleled authenticity and craftsmanship. Customers can find a wide array of divine idols, including those of popular deities like Krishna, Shiva, Ganesha, and Vishnu, as well as unique categories such as tribal art and antique vessels. The site is ideal for art collectors, spiritual practitioners, and those looking for meaningful, culturally rich gifts, offering a direct connection to India's artistic heritage.

## Core Website Pages

- [Authentic Chola Style Bronze Idols & Heritage Art](https://www.cholanarts.com/): Explore authentic Chola style bronze idols and heritage art preserving ancient traditions.
- [About Us](https://www.cholanarts.com/about-us): Learn about Cholan Arts' commitment to preserving the 1,000-year-old Lost-Wax tradition.
- [Products](https://www.cholanarts.com/products): Browse the full collection of authentic bronze idols and heritage art pieces.
- [Categories](https://www.cholanarts.com/categories): Discover a wide range of deity idols and art categories available.
- [Collections](https://www.cholanarts.com/collections): View curated collections of bronze art, including special occasion and antique items.
- [Contact Us](https://www.cholanarts.com/contact-us): Get in touch with Cholan Arts for inquiries or custom orders.

## Deity Idols by Category

- [Divine Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/divine-idols): Explore a variety of divine idols crafted in authentic Chola style.
- [Krishna Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/krishna-idols): Shop for authentic bronze idols of Lord Krishna.
- [Shiva Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/shiva-idols): Find museum-quality bronze sculptures of Lord Shiva.
- [Ganesha Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/ganesha-idols): Browse a diverse collection of Ganesha idols in bronze.
- [Buddha Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/buddha-idols): Discover serene bronze idols of Lord Buddha.
- [Hanuman Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/hanuman-idols): Shop for powerful bronze representations of Lord Hanuman.
- [Murugan Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/murugan-idols): Explore authentic bronze idols of Lord Murugan.
- [Amman Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/amman-idols): Find bronze idols of various Amman forms.
- [Ardhanaree Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/ardhanaree-idols): Discover unique Ardhanarishvara bronze sculptures.
- [Balaji Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/balaji-idols): Shop for authentic bronze idols of Lord Balaji.
- [Boga Sakthi Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/boga%20sakthi-idols): Explore bronze idols of Boga Sakthi.
- [Saraswathi Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/saraswathi-idols): Find bronze idols of Goddess Saraswathi.
- [Lakshmi Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/lakshmi-idols): Shop for auspicious bronze idols of Goddess Lakshmi.
- [Vishnu Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/vishnu-idols): Discover bronze sculptures of Lord Vishnu.
- [Parvathi Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/parvathi-idols): Explore bronze idols of Goddess Parvathi.
- [Narasimha Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/narasimha-idols): Find bronze idols of Lord Narasimha.
- [Radha Krishna Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/radha%20krishna-idols): Shop for divine bronze idols of Radha and Krishna.
- [Durga Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/durga-idols): Discover powerful bronze idols of Goddess Durga.
- [Nandi Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/nandi-idols): Explore bronze sculptures of Nandi, the divine bull.
- [Kali Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/kali-idols): Find fierce and majestic bronze idols of Goddess Kali.
- [Tribal Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/tribal-idols): Discover unique tribal art and idol collections.
- [Sculptures](https://www.cholanarts.com/category/sculptures): Browse a variety of artistic bronze sculptures.

## Collections and Gifts

- [Brass Collections](https://www.cholanarts.com/collection/brass-collections): Explore exquisite art and idols crafted from brass.
- [New Year Gifts](https://www.cholanarts.com/collection/new-year-gifts): Find auspicious and unique bronze gifts for the New Year.
- [Corporate Gifts](https://www.cholanarts.com/collection/corporate-gifts): Discover elegant and meaningful bronze gifts for corporate clients.
- [Antique Bronze Vessels](https://www.cholanarts.com/collection/antique-bronze-vessels): Shop for unique antique bronze vessels with historical significance.
- [Types of Deity Idols](https://www.cholanarts.com/collection/types-of-deity-idols): Learn about and shop different types of deity idols.
